page.title: Category:88 Extra Pilgrimage Sites of Shikoku

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '[[四国八十八箇所]]の番外霊場に関するカテゴリ。番外霊場のうち[[四国別格二十霊場]]は[[:Category:四国別格二十霊場]]...'
revision.text:
[[四国八十八箇所]]の番外霊場に関するカテゴリ。番外霊場のうち[[四国別格二十霊場]]は[[:Category:四国別格二十霊場]]カテゴリに分類。
{{DEFAULTSORT:しこくはちしゆうはちかしよはんかいれいしよう}} [[Category::四国八十八箇所|*はんかい]] [[Category:霊場巡礼]]

[[四国八十八箇所]]の番外霊場に関するカテゴリ。番外霊場のうち[[四国別格二十霊場]]は[[:Category:四国別格二十霊場]]カテゴリに分類。
{{DEFAULTSORT:しこくはちしゆうはちかしよはんかいれいしよう}} [[Category:四国八十八箇所|*はんかい]] [[Category:霊場巡礼]]

revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[ja:Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[四国八十八箇所]]の番外霊場に関するカテゴリ。番外霊場のうち[[四国別格二十霊場]]は[[:Category:四国別格二十霊場]]カテゴリに分類。 {{座標一覧}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:しこくはちしゆうはちかしよはんかいれいしよう}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場]]|version=42634954}} [[ja:Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場]]
==Old Content==
(2025-05-16T00:38:47Z): (Bot: add category Category:霊場巡礼)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Butsumoin]].
(2025-05-16T00:38:44Z): (Bot: add category Category:Shikoku Pilgrimage Sites)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Butsumoin]].
(2025-05-15T00:55:20Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Butsumoin]].
[[ja:Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場]] {{translated page|ja|四国八十八箇所番外霊場|2=Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Pilgrimages to Sacred Sites]] [[Category:Shikoku Pilgrimage Sites]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{座標一覧}} {{citation needed|しこくはちしゆうはちかしよはんかいれいしよう}} {{translated page|ja|Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場|version=42634954}} {{translated page|ja|四国八十八箇所番外霊場|2=Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{wikidata link|Q9599389}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:四国八十八箇所番外霊場]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Butsumoin]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Pilgrimages to Sacred Sites]] [[Category:Shikoku Pilgrimage Sites]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]
